title: Senior Frontend Developer (React / Next.js)
description: Job Description: We are recruiting on behalf of a leading technology enterprise in Dubai. Our client is looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to architect high-performance web applications and drive digital transformation.

Key Responsibilities: Lead frontend architecture using React and Next.js. Collaborate closely with product managers and backend engineers. Ensure compliance with modern web performance (LCP/CWV) standards. Requirements: Minimum 5+ years of software engineering experience in GCC or global markets. Strong command of modern UI/UX and state management.

title: Group HR & Emiratisation Manager
description: Job Description: We are seeking an experienced HR & Emiratisation Manager for a major financial services organization in Abu Dhabi. You will oversee end-to-end HR operations, talent acquisition, and MOHRE compliance.

Key Responsibilities: Drive strategic recruitment and onboarding across all departments. Manage UAE National (Tawteen) hiring quotas in compliance with MOHRE regulations. Oversee employee relations and labor law compliance. Requirements: Minimum 7 years of GCC HR leadership experience. Deep expertise in UAE labor laws and WPS.

title: Lead AI & Applied Machine Learning Scientist
description: Job Description: Our client, a cutting-edge AI enterprise in Dubai, is seeking an experienced AI Scientist to lead the development of predictive modeling algorithms and generative AI solutions.

Key Responsibilities: Design, train, and deploy advanced ML/DL models. Analyze large-scale enterprise datasets to unlock actionable business insights. Mentor junior data engineers and collaborate with cloud infrastructure teams. Requirements: Master's or Ph.D. in Data Science, Computer Science, or equivalent. Expertise in Python, PyTorch/TensorFlow, and cloud AI pipelines.
